title: Dripped PvP
description: A Crystal PvP pack.  Get dripped out for your next fight!
body:
# Get That Drip

Get dripped out for your next fight.  This pack features comes with:

1. Low Fire.
2. Small totem pop particles.
3. No Pumpkin blur.
4. Totem Of Undying is now a pistol
5. Reduced Particles

<details>
<summary>⚔ Other Details ⚔</summary>

- Dark colored fire
- Gold Armor Glint (can be changed using No More Purple Mod).
- Darker GUI
- Deal With It Glasses crit particles
- Money damage particles

</details>
